title: Structured logging
recommendation: Standardize structured logging with request, org, shipment, and job correlation context.

title: Centralized env validation
recommendation: Centralize environment validation for API, web, mobile, and workers with typed schemas.

title: Seeded demo environments
recommendation: Offer self-serve demo environments with realistic operational data.

title: Tenant-safe data access
recommendation: Enforce tenant-scoped repository and service access patterns across all non-public endpoints.

title: Contract tests
recommendation: Add API contract tests around load, shipment, tracking, and billing workflows.

title: SLOs and alerts
recommendation: Establish SLOs and alert thresholds for latency, job failures, and webhook processing.

title: Auth middleware consistency
recommendation: Audit all protected routes for standard middleware ordering and scope enforcement.

title: Prisma query review
recommendation: Review Prisma queries for missing indexes, N+1 patterns, and unbounded list access.

title: Role-based dashboards
recommendation: Create role-based home dashboards for carrier, broker, and shipper users so each persona lands on their highest-value operational view first.

title: Vertical landing pages
recommendation: Launch landing pages for carrier, broker, shipper, and enterprise operations personas.

title: Comparison pages
recommendation: Create direct comparison pages against spreadsheets, legacy TMS, and generic CRM workflows.

title: Trust assets
recommendation: Strengthen security, compliance, and reliability pages with concrete controls and uptime metrics.

title: Urgency-first dashboard
recommendation: Redesign operations dashboards around urgent queues and pending decisions rather than static analytics blocks.

title: Dense table mode
recommendation: Introduce dense table modes with sticky action columns, filters, and saved views for dispatch workflows.

title: Timeline detail pages
recommendation: Make shipment detail pages timeline-first with status evidence and next actions.

title: Secrets hygiene
recommendation: Replace scattered direct env access and non-null assertions with config accessors.

title: Compliance document tracking
recommendation: Track insurance, W9, authority, and safety document freshness across carriers.

title: Monitoring coverage
recommendation: Expand tracing around dispatch workflows, external integrations, and document processing.

title: Exception queues
recommendation: Build exception management queues for late pickup, detention, failed delivery, and missed check calls.

title: Visibility portal
recommendation: Introduce customer-facing shipment visibility portals with branded tracking pages.
impact: Increases retention and reduces support volume

title: Audit-ready histories
recommendation: Show full action histories for status changes, pricing edits, and user interventions.

title: ROI calculator
recommendation: Build ROI calculators around reduced empty miles, faster billing, and fewer service failures.

title: Segmented onboarding
recommendation: Create onboarding journeys by fleet size, revenue band, and logistics maturity.

title: Lead capture upgrades
recommendation: Add role-specific lead magnets, calculators, templates, and diagnostic checklists.

title: Global command bar
recommendation: Add persistent search and command entry for loads, shipments, carriers, documents, and actions.

title: Severity system
recommendation: Standardize alert severity, state badges, and recovery actions across the product.

title: Margin-aware dispatch
recommendation: Add dispatch recommendations using buy rate, sell rate, margin thresholds, and service risk.

title: Appointment workflows
recommendation: Build appointment scheduling and rescheduling workflows with notifications and accountability.

title: Accessorial capture
recommendation: Capture detention, lumper, TONU, and layover events with timestamps and evidence.

title: Document intelligence
recommendation: Implement document intelligence for BOL, POD, and rate confirmation ingestion and classification.

title: Carrier scorecards
recommendation: Create carrier scorecards for on-time pickup, claims, communication, and paperwork quality.

title: Check-call automation
recommendation: Automate check-call cadences with exception-triggered human escalation.

title: Claims management
recommendation: Add claims intake, investigation, and resolution workflows with document timelines.

title: Invoice readiness queue
recommendation: Create invoice readiness queues that block billing until required evidence is complete.

title: Exception playbooks
recommendation: Attach standard playbooks to delay, breakdown, temperature, and claim events.

title: Background job hardening
recommendation: Add idempotency, retries, dead-letter handling, and replay tooling for async jobs.

title: Security automation
recommendation: Add dependency scanning, secret scanning, and container scanning into CI.

title: Feature flags
recommendation: Introduce tenant-aware feature flags for controlled rollouts and experiments.

title: Load lifecycle automation
recommendation: Add load lifecycle automation with status-driven tasks, reminders, and handoff rules.

title: Workflow templates
recommendation: Add configurable workflow templates by customer segment and freight mode.

title: Shipment profitability
recommendation: Show shipment and customer profitability after accessorials, delays, and claims.

title: Document workspace
recommendation: Unify rate confirmations, BOL, POD, and invoices in a shipment-centric document workspace.

title: AI copilot prompts
recommendation: Offer guided AI actions for dispatch updates, check calls, and exception summaries.

title: Pricing guardrails
recommendation: Add approval flows when quoted rates fall below configured margin thresholds.

title: Revenue leakage checks
recommendation: Detect missing charges, missed accessorials, and incomplete paperwork before invoicing.

title: Case study engine
recommendation: Publish proof-based case studies showing margin improvement and dispatch efficiency gains.

title: Expansion revenue plays
recommendation: Trigger upsell motions based on workflow adoption, load volume, and team growth.

title: Onboarding concierge
recommendation: Offer white-glove migration and setup packages for larger accounts.
impact: Improves win rate for mid-market deals

title: Facility performance views
recommendation: Track shipper and receiver dwell, delays, rejections, and service issues by facility.

title: ELD and telematics integrations
recommendation: Integrate location and driver status feeds to improve ETA quality and automate exceptions.

title: Customer SLA dashboards
recommendation: Expose SLA performance by shipper, lane, facility, and account manager.

title: Proof-of-service bundle
recommendation: Bundle status evidence, communication, and documents into a single service record.

title: Shared package boundaries
recommendation: Move duplicated domain constants and schemas into the shared package.

title: Developer seed data
recommendation: Provide realistic multi-tenant freight seed data for local development and demos.

title: Error taxonomy
recommendation: Define a shared error taxonomy and client-safe error response format.

title: Schema evolution playbooks
recommendation: Document rollback-safe migration patterns and data backfill procedures.

title: Filter persistence
recommendation: Save user filters, table layouts, and recent workspaces per role and tenant.

title: Premium AI packaging
recommendation: Package AI automation as a measurable premium add-on tied to operator productivity.

title: CI quality gates
recommendation: Split lint, typecheck, unit, integration, and build checks for faster feedback and clearer failures.

title: Customer collaboration
recommendation: Add shared notes, tasks, and approvals for internal and external stakeholders.

title: Multi-entity support
recommendation: Support parent-child organizations, divisions, and branch visibility models.

title: Playbook library
recommendation: Ship industry playbooks for dry van, reefer, flatbed, drayage, and final mile.

title: SLA management
recommendation: Let teams define service-level targets and track SLA breaches by account and shipment.

title: Referral loop
recommendation: Create referral incentives for brokers, carriers, and consultants.

title: Outbound signal scoring
recommendation: Use hiring, growth, and fleet expansion signals to prioritize outbound accounts.

title: Content moat
recommendation: Publish operational benchmarks on detention, on-time pickup, and invoice cycle times.

title: Win-loss review loop
recommendation: Institutionalize win-loss interviews and feed the results back into product and messaging.

title: Document preview flows
recommendation: Enable in-context previews for BOL, POD, invoices, and confirmations without route changes.

title: Margin visibility
recommendation: Surface buy rate, sell rate, margin, and exception risk near dispatch decisions.

title: Operational map view
recommendation: Add a purposeful map view for active loads with delay and cluster overlays.

title: Rules engine
recommendation: Create a no-code rules engine for operational automations and escalations.

title: Integration marketplace
recommendation: Launch a marketplace for TMS, accounting, ELD, telematics, and document integrations.

title: Embedded guidance
recommendation: Integrate concise contextual guidance inside complex workflows instead of relying only on docs.

title: Pricing experiments
recommendation: Test packaging by shipment volume, user seats, and automation depth.

title: Churn warning program
recommendation: Use product signals to trigger customer success interventions before renewal risk grows.

title: Keyboard efficiency
recommendation: Add keyboard shortcuts for common dispatcher actions and record navigation.

title: Progressive disclosure
recommendation: Hide secondary controls behind progressive disclosure in complex screens.

title: Empty state strategy
recommendation: Design role-specific empty states that teach the next operational action.

title: Notification center
recommendation: Create a unified notification center with triage, snooze, and assignment features.

title: Form design system
recommendation: Standardize validation patterns, helper text, and save behavior across forms.

title: Context panels
recommendation: Use side panels for quick record inspection and edits from list views.

title: Mode-specific flows
recommendation: Tailor workflows for reefer, flatbed, drayage, and final-mile constraints.

title: Routing recommendations
recommendation: Add route quality scoring based on historical dwell, tolls, and service outcomes.

title: Multi-stop complexity tools
recommendation: Support stop-level sequencing, timing, and service notes for multi-stop loads.

title: Procurement intelligence
recommendation: Track lane-level carrier performance and spot-buy outcomes to improve procurement decisions.

title: Predictive risk scoring
recommendation: Score loads for delay, claim, and margin risk before tender acceptance.

title: Monorepo ownership map
recommendation: Document ownership and review paths for each app, package, and critical flow.

title: Offline resilience
recommendation: Design retry and local cache strategies for mobile field workflows.

title: Capacity testing
recommendation: Run repeatable load tests for high-volume dispatch and tracking workloads.

title: What-if planning
recommendation: Add scenario planning for capacity constraints, delays, and route disruptions.

title: Embedded training
recommendation: Embed workflow coaching and contextual checklists inside complex screens.

title: Partner workspace
recommendation: Create shared operational workspaces for strategic shipper and carrier partners.

title: Partner channel strategy
recommendation: Develop reseller and implementation partner programs for freight consultants and agencies.

title: Community strategy
recommendation: Build a dispatch and operations community with templates, playbooks, and office hours.

title: Custom objects
recommendation: Allow custom fields, statuses, and object relationships per tenant.

title: Marketplace monetization
recommendation: Monetize partner integrations and data services through rev-share or premium placement.

title: Mobile operations shortcuts
recommendation: Build mobile-first quick actions for field users handling status updates and document capture.

title: On-screen collaboration cues
recommendation: Show who changed what and when in live operational records.

title: Accessibility hardening
recommendation: Audit focus states, contrast, keyboard support, and screen reader labeling across core flows.

title: Scenario highlighting
recommendation: Highlight probable downstream consequences before major state changes or cancellations.
